purpose: Tool contract drafts for operations-layer adapters. Complements tool_contract_registry_v0.json with operations-specific contracts for webhook, workflow, messaging, and repo management tools. All contracts start in staged or planned status per ADR-003.

contracts.name: Zapier Webhook Send

input_schema.notes: webhook_url_reference is a name/alias, never a raw URL with embedded secrets.

output_schema.notes: No HTTP response is returned in staged mode — only the drafted payload.

contracts.rollback_strategy: Delete staged queue entry; no external state to reverse in staged mode.

contracts.name: Zapier Manager — Zap Lifecycle

input_schema.notes: All mutating actions default to dry_run: true. Listing is read-only.

output_schema.notes: Mutating results are staged; read-only results are returned directly.

contracts.rollback_strategy: Re-enable or re-disable the Zap to its previous state; log previous state in receipt.

contracts.name: n8n Workflow Activation

input_schema.notes: activation_mode must be 'staged' or 'dry_run' in Operations Autopilot v0. Live activation is blocked.

output_schema.notes: No execution occurs — only the activation intent and trigger preview are recorded.

contracts.rollback_strategy: Deactivate workflow if it was activated; restore previous trigger configuration.

contracts.name: Gmail Send (Staged)

input_schema.notes: Email is drafted and previewed only. No send occurs in staged mode. Credential reference is by OAuth app name.

output_schema.notes: Returns the composed email for review; no message ID from Gmail.

contracts.rollback_strategy: Delete staged draft entry; no external email state to reverse.

contracts.name: Outlook Send (Staged)

input_schema.notes: Email is drafted and previewed only. No send occurs in staged mode. Credential reference is by OAuth app name.

output_schema.notes: Returns the composed email for review; no message ID from Outlook.

contracts.rollback_strategy: Delete staged draft entry; no external email state to reverse.

contracts.name: GitHub Repository Operations (Staged)

input_schema.notes: All operations default to dry_run: true. Only owned repos (per scope map) are eligible. Credential reference is by GitHub App or PAT name.

output_schema.notes: Returns the operation intent and scope validation; no GitHub API call is made in staged mode.

contracts.rollback_strategy: Reverse the specific GitHub operation (e.g., delete created branch, restore previous settings); log previous state in receipt.
